title: M1: Configure CI Pipeline
description:
## Step‑by‑Step Instructions
1. Create `.github/workflows/ci.yml`.
2. Add jobs: lint (golangci‑lint), backend test (`go test -race ./...`), frontend test (`cd web && pnpm test`).
3. Use `context7 github actions best‑practice` to fetch latest CI patterns.
4. Add badge status to README.

## DRY Requirement
- Keep CI steps reusable: extract common `setup-go` and `setup-node` steps into reusable actions.
- No duplicate script blocks; use YAML anchors.

## Context7 Tags
#context7: github actions latest
#context7: golangci lint config
#context7: pnpm test best‑practice

## ADR References
#ADR-0025: docs/adr/0025-frontend-pkg-manager-pnpm.md (pnpm guidelines)
#ADR-001: docs/adr/001-agents-architecture.md (project layout)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] CI workflow triggers on push and pull_request.
- [ ] All lint jobs pass.
- [ ] Backend tests pass with race detector.
- [ ] Frontend tests pass.
- [ ] No duplicate script blocks in YAML.
- [ ] Context7 commands executed without errors.
close_reason: Added CI workflow with lint, backend and frontend tests

title: M1: Initialize Project Repository
description:
## Step-by-Step Instructions
1. Run `go mod init github.com/baguspdam/mariadb-magic` (use your actual GitHub username) — **mandatory**: run `context7 go mod init best-practice` to get latest module naming conventions and Go version requirements.
2. Create target directory structure per CLAUDE.md and ADR-001 (agents-architecture.md):
   ```
   cmd/magicsync/
   internal/db/
   internal/models/
   internal/repo/
   internal/mariadb/
   internal/sync/
   internal/rules/
   internal/sse/
   internal/api/
   internal/maint/
   web/
   docs/adr/
   ```
   **Mandatory**: run `context7 golang project structure best-practice` to validate directory layout.
3. Initialize frontend with pnpm: `cd web && pnpm init` — **mandatory**: run `context7 pnpm init nextjs` to get correct pnpm configuration for Next.js static export.
4. Generate lock files: run `pnpm install` in `web/` to create `pnpm-lock.yaml`, and `go mod tidy` to create `go.sum`.
5. Verify setup:
   - Run `go list ./...` — must return no errors.
   - Run `cd web && pnpm list` — must return no errors.

## DRY Requirement
Apply DRY principle per CLAUDE.md:
- No duplicate code; extract helpers after 2nd use.
- Helpers used twice must be extracted to appropriate files (e.g., `repo/common.go` for `scanRow`/`execTx` helpers).
- No premature abstraction.

## Context7 Tags
#context7: go mod init latest
#context7: pnpm init nextjs
#context7: golang project structure

## ADR References
#ADR-001: docs/adr/001-agents-architecture.md (directory structure)
#ADR-0025: docs/adr/0025-frontend-pkg-manager-pnpm.md (pnpm usage)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `go.mod` exists with correct module name and Go version
- [ ] All target directories created per CLAUDE.md
- [ ] `pnpm-lock.yaml` exists in `web/`
- [ ] `go.sum` exists in project root
- [ ] `go list ./...` runs without error
- [ ] `cd web && pnpm list` runs without error
- [ ] DRY principle applied: no duplicate code in initial setup
- [ ] Context7 commands run for all referenced libraries
- [ ] Unit test stub passes: setup verification commands return no errors
close_reason: Project already initialized: go.mod, directories, pnpm lock, tests pass
